reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag, indicating that the patch meets their coding standards.

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Provided an Acked-by tag, indicating that the patch meets their testing requirements.
reviews.raw_body:
On Thu, Mar 12, 2026 at 04:51:50PM -0400, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> The MEMCG and !MEMCG variants are the same. lock_list_lru() has the
> same pattern when bailing. Consolidate into a common implementation.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series deduplicates the unlock_list_lru() function, which is currently implemented separately for MEMCG and non-MEMCG variants. The patch consolidates these implementations into a single common function.
